hero.title: Packers & Movers in Assam
hero.subtitle: Guwahati to Silchar, Dibrugarh to Jorhat — 3,068+ verified movers across 10 cities in Assam.

intro:
Assam is the gateway to Northeast India, with Guwahati serving as the region's commercial and transportation hub. Radhe packers and movers connects you with 3,068+ verified movers across Guwahati, Silchar, Dibrugarh, Jorhat, Nagaon, Dispur, Tinsukia, Sivasagar and 2 more cities.

From Guwahati's rapidly expanding residential zones along the Brahmaputra to Silchar's Barak Valley and Dibrugarh's tea-garden belt, our KYC-verified vendors are experienced with Assam's flood plains, cross-river logistics and the unique challenges of Northeast relocation.
whyUs: Assam's Brahmaputra flooding, bridge capacity limits and the Northeast's limited road infrastructure during monsoons require movers with genuine local expertise. Our vendors monitor flood alerts, use waterproof packing as standard, and carry ₹5 lakh damage coverage on all moves.

faqs.q: How much do packers and movers cost in Assam?
faqs.a: Local 1 BHK moves within Assam cities start at ₹4,000. Guwahati local 2 BHK moves typically cost ₹6,000–₹11,000. Guwahati to Dibrugarh inter-city moves cost ₹9,000–₹16,000.

faqs.q: Which cities in Assam does Radhe packers and movers cover?
faqs.a: We cover 10 cities: Guwahati, Silchar, Dibrugarh, Jorhat, Nagaon, Dispur, Tinsukia, Sivasagar, Dhubri and Bongaigaon.

faqs.q: Do you handle moves during Assam's Brahmaputra flood season?
faqs.a: Yes. We monitor NDMA flood alerts for the Brahmaputra basin. If a route is affected, we use alternative roads or reschedule proactively with full customer notification.

faqs.q: Can you move goods from Assam to other Northeast states?
faqs.a: Yes. Guwahati is our Northeast hub for moves to Meghalaya, Nagaland, Manipur, Mizoram, Tripura and Arunachal Pradesh, all with GPS tracking and transit insurance.
